Compliance.description: PSIRA registered officers (Grade C required), SAIDSA-aligned, published POPIA manual, no major violations found, opposed restrictive 2025 PSIRA amendments.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Few HelloPeter reviews (4 total, mostly 1-star on rude guards 2021), Indeed employee rating 3.1/5 (pay/management complaints), no recent Google customer ratings found. Low volume negative.

Product Value.description: Competitive industry pricing assumed for large provider; comprehensive packages with unlimited callouts/monitoring. No direct value complaints.

Innovation.description: Smart technology, AI surveillance mentioned in blogs, tactical units; no dedicated customer app.

Customer Support.description: Control rooms, dedicated managers, regional support; reviews cite poor attitude/response quality.

Accessibility & Security.description: POPIA manual published with detailed security measures including access control, data memory control, transmission control. Website accessible.

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed employee reviews (3.1/5 Indeed), sparse negative customer feedback on HelloPeter; company promotes positive incidents/responses.
